{
    "cli": "autograder.cli.users.tokens.list",
    "stdout_assertion_func": "autograder.testing.asserts.equals_clean_tokens",
    "arguments": [
        '--user', 'server-admin@test.edulinq.org',
        '--pass', 'server-admin',
        '--target-user', 'course-student@test.edulinq.org',
    ],
}
---
{
    "found-user": true,
    "tokens": [
        {
            "access-time": 0,
            "creation-time": 0,
            "id": "test-token-id",
            "name": "test",
            "source": "user"
        }
    ]
}
